releases.author: kilrkrow
releases.description:
## FlowScript Diagrams 0.1.0

Render ` ```flow ` code blocks as inline SVG flowcharts inside any Obsidian note.

### Features
- Renders FlowScript DSL as inline SVG in Live Preview and Reading view
- Settings: light/dark theme, transparent background toggle
- Fully offline — no network calls, no telemetry

### Installation
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` and copy them to `.obsidian/plugins/flowscript-diagrams/` in your vault.
